Simple & quick

How to order

1

Pick your snacks

Add items to your basket and choose quantities.

2

Pay via UPI

Scan the QR or tap to pay — the amount is filled in for you.

3

Confirm on WhatsApp

Send your order to us in one tap to lock it in.

4

Freshly prepared

We cook it fresh and let you know when it's ready.

⏱️ Please order in advance: Gujarati snacks & breakfast — at least 1 day ahead. Dry snacks & chocolates — at least 2 days ahead.
📦 Minimum order: 0.5 kg per item · theplas from 10 pieces.
